steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The crucial evidence: “across cultures, people generally rated odors about the same: ethyl butyrate...was typically rated more pleasant than diethyl disulfide.” Different cultural groups reached the same odor preferences.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
B states the idea that was undermined: when different cultural groups rate odors identically, the claim that culture significantly influences perception doesn't hold up.

Choices A and C address factors the study doesn't test; D describes what the study supported rather than undermined.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
